summary: Iteration 2 regression + new-feature test of Phasor waitlist landing. All 6 backend pytest cases pass. All 20+ frontend checks pass (FloatingSocial, ThreatStats, MediaReviews marquee + 3 reviews, Navbar logo, Footer social+logo, mobile hidden, no overflow, no console errors, waitlist form + channel tabs regression).
passed: Backend: GET /api/waitlist/stats returns total+displayed_count with 3127 baseline
Backend: POST /api/waitlist valid email -> 200 with id/email/position/created_at, and increments total
Backend: POST /api/waitlist same email idempotent -> same id, total unchanged
Backend: GET /api/waitlist/admin without token -> 401; with token -> 200 list (no _id leak)
Frontend: nav-logo img src from customer-assets.emergentagent.com
Frontend: FloatingSocial visible desktop 1920 & 1280; hidden on 375 mobile
Frontend: threat-stat-seconds='3', loss='$40B', targets='1 in 4', success='77%'
Frontend: media-marquee present with .animate-marquee inner track
Frontend: review-nbc / review-fbi / review-cnn present with exact quote fragments
Frontend: waitlist form submit -> Secured success state (no regression)
Frontend: all 4 channel tabs (phone/zoom/chrome/email) clickable (no regression)
Frontend: zero console errors after filtering benign WebGL
critical_code_review_comments: Backend still uses MongoDB — Supabase Transaction Pooler URI migration is deferred and expected by product statement. Once user provides the URI, migration is required.
server.py: waitlist stores created_at as ISO string; the existing-entry response path re-parses it correctly. Consider storing native datetime in Mongo for simpler code paths.
server.py: ADMIN_TOKEN default 'phasor-admin-dev' is fine for dev but should be forced via env in production; consider raising if unset in prod.
FloatingSocial hides on <sm (<640px). Tablet 640-1024 shows it; consider hiding <md to avoid overlap with content on smaller tablets — currently no overlap detected but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: Added ~2 TEST_iter2_* waitlist entries during idempotent test (safe test emails, prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully green. New sections FloatingSocial / ThreatStats / MediaReviews validated with exact data-testid selectors and copy fragments. Backend unchanged from iter 1. When Supabase pooler URI arrives, next iter must re-run backend_test.py after Postgres migration and remove Mongo assertions if any.
